prompt: Two cranes lift beams, a welder seals them, a drone monitors progress, and two delivery AMRs supply materials. Welding can begin only after both cranes finish lifting. Drone must remain within 50 m radius of cranes. DeliveryAMRs must alternate: while one delivers, the other waits. Eventually, all beams are welded and drone reports completion.
constraints: WelderBot starts only after CraneA and CraneB finish lifting
MonitorDrone must remain within 50 m radius of both cranes
DeliveryAMR1 and DeliveryAMR2 alternate deliveries (mutual exclusion)
Eventually all beams welded and MonitorDrone reports completion
